ppnRate.description: PPN (Pajak Pertambahan Nilai) rate applied to this consideration line. The applicable rate MUST be sourced from current Indonesian tax regulation (DJP / PMK), not hardcoded. Current PPN standard is 0.11 (11%) per PMK 131/2024 under UU 7/2021 HPP; some categories (basic foods, books, health services) have reduced or zero rates.
ppnRate.x-ion-regulatory: UU 7/2021 HPP; PMK 131/2024 (or current applicable PMK)

ppnbmRate.description: PPnBM (Pajak Penjualan atas Barang Mewah) rate for luxury goods. Applied in addition to PPN. Applicable rate MUST be sourced from current regulation (rates vary by luxury category — check DJP for the applicable schedule under PMK 141/2021 and later).
ppnbmRate.x-ion-regulatory: UU 42/2009 tentang PPN dan PPnBM; current applicable PMK
ppnbmRate.x-ion-condition: Required on PPNBM consideration lines for luxury goods

discountType.description: Whether the discount is a percentage of item price or a fixed IDR amount. Used on PROVIDER_BENEFIT and BUYER_BENEFIT consideration lines.

discountValue.description: Value of the discount. If discountType=PERCENT, this is a decimal e.g. 0.10 for 10%. If discountType=FIXED, this is an IDR amount.

breakupLineType.description: Canonical type for this consideration breakup line. ITEM: per-item price line. DELIVERY: shipping/delivery charge. TAX: PPN tax line. TAX_PPNBM: luxury goods tax line. HANDLING: special handling surcharge (cold chain, oversized). PACKAGING: gift or special packaging charge. INSURANCE: shipping insurance. PROVIDER_BENEFIT: seller-funded discount. BUYER_BENEFIT: BAP-funded discount or cashback. COD_FEE: cash on delivery handling fee. TRADE_IN: trade-in deduction value. LOYALTY_REDEEM: loyalty points redemption. FINANCE_CHARGE: BNPL or credit interest charge. GIFT_WRAP: gift wrapping fee. PLATFORM_FEE: ION network participant fee.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for this consideration in IDR. For the final consideration record, this is the net payable amount after all discounts and taxes.

currency.description: Always IDR for domestic ION transactions.
